text: I wake up at six o'clock every morning. First, I stretch for ten minutes, then take a quick shower. After breakfast, I review my to-do list before heading to work. My work schedule starts at eight and ends at five, with a short lunch break around noon. At five thirty, I go for a run in the park. I do this three times a week, but I try to stay active daily. In the evenings, I cook dinner, read for thirty minutes, and occasionally call my family. By ten thirty, I am in bed. This routine keeps me productive and calm. Consistency helps me stay focused and balanced.
